issues.comment: The `totpStep1` key in the Lithuanian (`messages_lt.properties`) file was changed to Italian text: `totpStep1=Installa una delle seguenti applicazioni sul tuo cellulare:`. This is Italian ("Install one of the following applications on your phone"), not Lithuanian. The surrounding lines remain in Lithuanian (e.g., `totpStep2=Atidarykite programėlę...`), confirming this is a wrong-locale error.
Same issue as Bug 1, but in the login messages file: `loginTotpStep1=Installa una delle seguenti applicazioni sul tuo cellulare:` — Italian text in a Lithuanian locale file.

The `totpStep1` value uses Traditional Chinese characters (手機, 安裝, 應用程式) in a Simplified Chinese (`zh_Hans`) file: `totpStep1=在您的手機上安裝以下應用程式之一：`. The correct Simplified Chinese would use: 手机, 安装, 应用程序. The Traditional Chinese file (`messages_zh_Hant.properties`) has a proper Traditional Chinese translation. This `zh_Hans` (Simplified Chinese) file should use simplified characters throughout.
